message:
feat(fsqlite-planner): add AST-to-VDBE code generation for SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE (bd-1mtt)

Implements §10.6 codegen: rowid-seek and full-scan SELECT, index-seek SELECT,
INSERT with VALUES/RETURNING, UPDATE with full-record rewrite, and DELETE with
rowid guard. Includes 10 unit tests covering all DML paths and concurrent mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
